workflowHealth.name: Route Inventory Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Regenerate route inventory and reconcile unexpected route additions/removals before compliance claims.

workflowHealth.name: Experience Vitals Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Address route-tier vitals budget breaches and adjust baseline drift with explicit approvals.

workflowHealth.name: Cognitive Load Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Reduce public-route cognitive density and CTA competition before weak chunking becomes chronic.

workflowHealth.name: Cognitive Fluency Calibration Dispatch
workflowHealth.recommendation: Use the monthly calibration packet to drive human-depth Page Experience Auditor review on the worst-scoring routes.

workflowHealth.name: Cognitive Calibration Loop
workflowHealth.recommendation: Use quarterly deterministic-vs-auditor deltas to tune scoring weights and keep calibration drift controlled.

workflowHealth.name: Experience Portfolio Rollup
workflowHealth.recommendation: Use the portfolio rollup as the single triage board for cross-agent issues and route the suggested mitigation to an owner immediately.

workflowHealth.name: Luxury Page Sentinel
workflowHealth.recommendation: Triage blocking incidents by dimension and burn down quarantine debt before expiry.

workflowHealth.name: Dashboard Behavior Baseline Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Validate dashboard contracts and probe credentials, then address route-specific regressions.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Integrity Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Resolve parity/title/landmark contract failures before certifying dashboard trust posture.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Escalation Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Route trust violations to owning teams quickly and escalate P0 findings within the SLA window.

workflowHealth.name: Journey Synthetic Agent
workflowHealth.recommendation: Monitor tier-1 journey step percentiles and resolve high abandonment-risk steps before conversion impact.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Daily Report
workflowHealth.recommendation: Use daily trust telemetry to surface contract drift quickly and keep remediation ownership explicit.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Weekly Issues Report
workflowHealth.recommendation: Review trust issue clusters and convert repeated failures into backlog remediation with owners.

workflowHealth.name: Trust Monthly Trends Report
workflowHealth.recommendation: Use monthly trust trend deltas to ratchet contracts and prevent drift from becoming normalized.

workflowHealth.name: Experience Seeding Checklist
workflowHealth.recommendation: Resolve failed dispatches and keep weekly seeding evidence fresh so monitoring remains auditable.

workflowHealth.name: Probe Account Reset
workflowHealth.recommendation: Reset synthetic probe account capacity before route coverage degrades from limit-triggered skips.

riskRows.risk: Route compliance claims drift from full-site reality when inventory cadence slips.
riskRows.mitigation: Route Inventory Agent runs daily and is freshness-monitored by watchdog.

riskRows.risk: High-volume style/availability findings become noise and true regressions are missed.
riskRows.mitigation: Incident correlation and quarantine/debt ratchet keep findings actionable.

riskRows.risk: Experience regressions ship after green CI if live-route checks are stale.
riskRows.mitigation: Sentinel and dashboard baseline cadence with explicit freshness thresholds.

missing: Cross-route trust integrity trend history with 7-day and 30-day drift deltas on parity/title/landmark contracts.
Deterministic cognitive fluency/load score persisted per route tier with grade-band trending.
Experience baseline review bot that proposes ratcheted stricter thresholds after 30 stable days.
Field-vs-lab experience delta tracker for route-level LCP/INP confidence checks.
